title: Echoic 6-M
description: Scores at least 50 on the EESA subtest (at least 20 from Group 2).(T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he scores 50 on the EESA subtest (20 from Group 2). 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he scores 40 on the EESA subtest (15 from Group 2).

title: Echoic 7-M
description: Scores at least 60 on the EESA subtest.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he scores 60 on the EESA subtest. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he scores 55 on the EESA subtest.

title: Echoic 8-M
description: Scores at least 70 on the EESA subtest.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he scores 70 on the EESA subtest. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he scores 65 on the EESA subtest.

title: Echoic 9-M
description: Scores at least 80 on the EESA subtest.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he scores 80 on the EESA subtest. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he scores 75 on the EESA subtest.

title: Echoic 10-M
description: Scores at least 90 on the EESA subtest (at least 10 from Groups 4 and 5).
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he scores 90 on the EESA subtest (at least 10 from Groups 4 and 5). 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he scores 85 on the EESA subtest (at least 10 from Groups 4 and 5).

title: Listener Responding by Function, Feature, and Class (LRFFC)
description: Listener Responding by Function, Feature, and Class (LRFFC) — Level 2

title: LRFFC 6-M
description: Selects an animal or object from an array of 3, for 5 different sounds made by the corresponding items (e.g., Meow says a... Toot, toot goes the...). (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he correctly selects an animal or object from an array of 3, for 5 different sounds made by the corresponding items. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he correctly selects an animal or object from an array of 3, for 2 different sounds made by the corresponding items.

title: LRFFC 7-M
description: Selects 5 different foods or drinks when each are presented in an array of 5 (along with 4 non-food or non-drink items) and asked the verbal fill-ins you eat... and you drink... (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he correctly selects 5 different food or drink items when each are presented an array of 5 items, and an adult gives the verbal statement "you eat..." and "you drink...." 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he correctly selects 2 different food or drink items when each are presented an array of 5 items, and an adult gives the verbal statement "you eat..." and "you drink...."

title: LRFFC 8-M
description: Selects the correct item from an array of 8, for 25 different LRFFC fill-in statements of any type (e.g., You sit on a...). (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he correctly selects the item from an array of 5, for 25 different LRFFC fill-in-the-blank statements. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he correctly selects 12 items in this type of LRFFC task.

title: LRFFC 9-M
description: Selects the correct item from an array of 10 (or from a book), for 25 different verb-noun LRFFC what, which, or who questions (e.g., What do you ride? Which one barks? Who can hop?). (T)
